'''fafuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thamyn|thamyn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thamyn|thamyn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fafuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfiyith|fæfiyith]] || [[word:fæfiyij|fæfiyij]] || [[word:fæfiyish|fæfiyish]] || [[word:fæfiyi|fæfiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafufuyuth|fafufuyuth]] || [[word:fafufuyuj|fafufuyuj]] || [[word:fafufuyush|fafufuyush]] || [[word:fafufuyu|fafufuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafuyuth|fafuyuth]] || [[word:fafuyuj|fafuyuj]] || [[word:fafuyush|fafuyush]] || [[word:fafuyu|fafuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafufyuth|fafufyuth]] || [[word:fafufyuj|fafufyuj]] || [[word:fafufyush|fafufyush]] || [[word:fafufyuf|fafufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafuyuthu|fafuyuthu]] || [[word:fafuyuju|fafuyuju]] || [[word:fafuyushu|fafuyushu]] || [[word:fafuyuku|fafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafuyuth|fafuyuth]] || [[word:fafuyuj|fafuyuj]] || [[word:fafuyush|fafuyush]] || [[word:fafuyu|fafuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafuyuthul|fafuyuthul]] || [[word:fafuyujul|fafuyujul]] || [[word:fafuyushul|fafuyushul]] || [[word:fafuyukul|fafuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafuyuthuthu|fafuyuthuthu]] || [[word:fafuyujuju|fafuyujuju]] || [[word:fafuyushushu|fafuyushushu]] || [[word:fafuyuku|fafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafuyuthun|fafuyuthun]] || [[word:fafuyujun|fafuyujun]] || [[word:fafuyushun|fafuyushun]] || [[word:fafuyukun|fafuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafuyuthuoro|fafuyuthuoro]] || [[word:fafuyujuoro|fafuyujuoro]] || [[word:fafuyushuoro|fafuyushuoro]] || [[word:fafuyukuoro|fafuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
